attention_flip.title: Attention Flip
attention_flip.question: Does this case deserve expensive evidence work?

decision_flip.title: Decision Flip
decision_flip.question: Can another operational domain change the action?
decision_flip.proof: Same critical patient: a free bed produces assign_bed; ER gridlock produces divert.

brake_save.title: Brake Save
brake_save.question: Can Baymax stop itself when another evidence domain adds uncertainty?
brake_save.proof: Patient-only suggests discharge_plan; drug-safety evidence changes policy to human_review.
